title: Better Leaves Plus
description: This texture pack adds more realistic leaves, with a better model, and removing the squareness
body:
# **Better Leaves Plus**
## **ENGLISH**

🌿 Better Leaves Plus breathes new life into your world with lusher, denser, and more natural-looking leaves. This texture pack adds extra layers to your leaf blocks, creating a more realistic and immersive visual effect. Perfect for bringing your forests, gardens, and landscapes to life with a much more organic feel. Make every tree look spectacular! 🌳✨



By @d_de_diego_d
__________________________________________________________________________________________
## **ESPAÑOL**

🌿 Better Leaves Plus da un nuevo aire a tu mundo con hojas más frondosas, densas y naturales. Este texture pack añade capas extra a los bloques de hojas, creando un efecto visual más realista y envolvente. Perfecto para darle vida a tus bosques, jardines y paisajes con un toque mucho más orgánico. ¡Haz que cada árbol luzca espectacular! 🌳✨



By @d_de_diego_d
